{"session_id":"1674fe80-412a-44bd-8140-43881d62bdb3","transcript_path":"/home/mcrowe/.claude/projects/-home-mcrowe/1674fe80-412a-44bd-8140-43881d62bdb3.jsonl","cwd":"/home/mcrowe","permission_mode":"auto","effort":{"level":"medium"},"hook_event_name":"Stop","stop_hook_active":false,"last_assistant_message":"Strong material to draw from. Proposed 10 candidate slides — pick the ones you want:

---

### Candidate slides — `~/.agents` + isolated-AI deep-dive

| # | Slide | Concrete content |
|---|-------|------------------|
| **A** | **`~/.agents/` — Personal AI OS** | Layer diagram: `rules/` (stack-specific gates) → `skills/` (53 skills) → `hooks/` (event guards) → `docs/` (playbooks). Top-level `config.json` ties together. |
| **B** | **Hook Anatomy — Forcing Discipline** | 4 production hooks with one-line purpose: `bash-ban-raw-tools` (forces compressed tools), `code-nav-gate` (blocks raw reads until CBM/Serena fires), `code-nav-marker` (PostToolUse unlock), `handoff-session-resume` (resume context across compaction). Story: "AI obeys rules it would otherwise drift from." |
| **C** | **Skills Catalog (53 skills)** | Bucketed grid by domain: **Testing/Quality** (tdd, test, verify-before-complete, lint, review, code-optimizer) · **Security** (security-review, observability) · **Design/UX** (frontend-design, design-an-interface, accessibility, core-web-vitals, web-design-guidelines) · **AI Workflow** (grill-me, handoff, decompose-into-slices, btw, find-skills, create-skill) · **Infra** (packer-build, pulumi-preview-summary, github-workflows) · **Docs** (write-docs, write-milestone-brief, blog-writer, userinterface-wiki) · **Compression** (caveman, caveman-compress, compress) |
| **D** | **Featured Skill — `grill-me`** | Pull description: "Relentless sequential interview that stress-tests a plan until every decision branch is resolved. Blocks execution until alignment is reached." Use case: stops AI from building hand-wavy specs. |
| **E** | **Featured Skill — `security-review`** | STRIDE-style threat model, filing-ready report w/ severity + exploit scenario + remediation. Triggered before auth/data/input changes ship. |
| **F** | **Caveman Mode — Token Cost Discipline** | Compression dial (`lite`/`full`/`ultra`). ~75% input token reduction while preserving technical accuracy. RTK pipeline reduces command output 60–99%. Direct $ impact on AI bills. |
| **G** | **Isolated-AI — System Architecture** | Mermaid-style topology: Customer AWS → Cognito → CloudFront → ALB → single EC2 running 7 dockerized services + Aurora pgvector + Bedrock VPC endpoint. **Key**: data stays in customer account. |
| **H** | **Isolated-AI — 8 Services** | `librechat` (UI) · `litellm` (gateway) · `isolation-service` (project boundaries) · `dev-api` (IDE token portal) · `ingestion` (RAG doc pipeline) · `control-plane` (Lambdas: wake/idle/admin) · `app-host` · `shared` |
| **I** | **Isolated-AI — Decision Log (ADRs)** | 15+ committed ADRs: e.g. "two-tier SMB product", "60-min idle threshold", "Cognito-only wake trigger", "pydoit over Makefile", "per-user LiteLLM key injection". Demonstrates production-grade decision discipline. |
| **J** | **The Meta-Loop** | Diagram showing skills/hooks/rules from `~/.agents` guiding development of isolated-AI. The same discipline I'd bring to Resurgent — I eat my own dog food. |

---

**Recommended subset for the deck** (mark which you want — I default to all 10 if you say "build them all"):

- Strong technical signal: **A, B, C, G, H, J**
- Adds personality/depth: **D, E, F**
- Adds maturity proof: **I**

Pick 5–10 and I generate. Want all 10?"}
